This CNG pump engages in fraud and illegal activity such as fuel theft or billing more than my fuel tank capacity. First thing is that meter starts with more than 70 rupees. Second thing in my last 10 years, I have never seen a 10kg CNG bill in my WagonR car. I would warn everyone to be very careful and try to avoid going to this CNG pump.
It is essential to report any such incidents to the authorities and seek alternative fueling options. I strongly advise against supporting businesses that engage in such practices.

This is one CNG pump near Nirmal Lifestyle Mall on LBS marg, Mulund. Usually there is a good pressure so you get your turn quickly.  Since it is on the roadside,  sometimes it hindrances traffic.

There is a common queue for Auto and cars. So there could be a little annoyance. For factory fitted cng kits of the cars, you have to reverse and park. It may be difficult during traffic hours.

I have noticed that these days, the queue is manageable and you get your turn in 10 to 15 minutes.

A 24/7 Cng pump in Mulund. Situated next to Domino's/Vodafone gallery. It has 2 seperate filling for Aito rickshaws and for 4 wheelers.
Average wait time can go to around 15 - 20 minutes.
Be ready to wait even if you go at 11 pm.

One of the only 2 CNG pumps I think that are in Mulund and only 1 I think that operates 24x7. So you can easily guess that it has long waiting usually. And to make matters worse, recently RTO has disallowed making 2 different lines for cars and Auto Rickshaws. It's an authorised MGL Pump and has a good pressure normally.
1 big disadvantage of this pump is that it's pumps are so aligned that only 2 cars can fill up CNG at a time and normally 7-8 rickshaws have to stand in a reverse U shape to stand around pumps to fill up CNG.
Though only 1 queue is allowed, they have to manage cars and Rickshaws separately due to above pump alignment.
In the daytime, they have hired a watchman to manage cars and Rickshaws but during night time there is no one to manage. And pump operators don't care to call car owners when 1 of 2 slots for cars is empty and Rickshaw drivers take advantage of this situation and car owners have to unnecessarily wait for more time.
